stemHtml: Explain the difference, if any, between the effect of a tailwind on the flight path angle and the effect of a tailwind on the descent angle…

options.a: A tailwind will increase the flight path angle and decrease the descent angle.
options.b: A tailwind will decrease the flight path angle and decrease the descent angle.
options.c: A tailwind will decrease the flight path angle and the descent angle will remain constant.
options.d: In a tailwind, the flight path angle will remain constant and the descent angle will remain constant.
